meta.title: The daily word game
meta.description: Play Wordle in 80+ languages — from Arabic to Yoruba, the largest multilingual Wordle. Word definitions, no ads, no login. Daily puzzle plus 8 game modes.
meta.keywords: english, puzzle, word, play, game, online, guess, daily

unlimited.title: Unlimited — Play with no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in English. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in English as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in English. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in English. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in English. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in English. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in English. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in English. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: I got today's Wordle in {n}. Can you beat me?
text.share_challenge_lose: I didn't get today's Wordle. Can you?
text.hard_mode_position: Hard mode: {letter} must be in position {position}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.play_more_languages: Play more languages to see your global stats!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Play Wordle daily like an app
ui.no_games_yet: You haven't played any games yet. Pick a language to start!
ui.easy_desc: Any word accepted, even if not in the dictionary
ui.normal_desc: Guesses must be valid words from the dictionary
ui.hard_desc: Revealed hints must be used in subsequent guesses
ui.future_word: This word hasn't been played yet. Come back later!
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
ui.semantic_compass_empty: Your compass will appear after your first guess.
ui.semantic_compass_no_bearing_sub: The compass can't place this one on a known axis — try a word from a different corner of meaning.
ui.semantic_hint_nudge: The oracle might nudge you in the right direction.
ui.semantic_hint_note: One hint per game. Use it wisely.
ui.semantic_cta_body: Type any word. The closer its meaning to the target, the lower its rank. Rank #1 = found it.
ui.semantic_unavailable: This mode is temporarily unavailable — the word embedding data is being generated. Check back in a few minutes.
ui.game_mode_subtitle: Different ways to play — same language, new challenges.
ui.board_picker_subtitle: Same rules, more boards. Pick your challenge.
ui.homepage_languages_counting: languages and counting — more added regularly.
ui.homepage_and_more_desc: Octordle, Semantic Explorer, Custom Word, Party Mode — and more coming soon.
